title: Maximum Fruits Harvested After at Most K Steps

testcases.input: fruits = [[2,8],[6,3],[8,6]], startPos = 5, k = 4 Output: 9 Explanation: The optimal way is to: - Move right to position 6 and harvest 3 fruits - Move right to position 8 and harvest 6 fruits You moved 3 steps and harvested 3 + 6 = 9 fruits in total.
testcases.expectedOutput: 9 Explanation: The optimal way is to: - Move right to position 6 and harvest 3 fruits - Move right to position 8 and harvest 6 fruits You moved 3 steps and harvested 3 + 6 = 9 fruits in total.

testcases.input: fruits = [[0,9],[4,1],[5,7],[6,2],[7,4],[10,9]], startPos = 5, k = 4 Output: 14 Explanation: You can move at most k = 4 steps, so you cannot reach position 0 nor 10. The optimal way is to: - Harvest the 7 fruits at the starting position 5 - Move left to position 4 and harvest 1 fruit - Move right to position 6 and harvest 2 fruits - Move right to position 7 and harvest 4 fruits You moved 1 + 3 = 4 steps and harvested 7 + 1 + 2 + 4 = 14 fruits in total.
testcases.expectedOutput: 14 Explanation: You can move at most k = 4 steps, so you cannot reach position 0 nor 10. The optimal way is to: - Harvest the 7 fruits at the starting position 5 - Move left to position 4 and harvest 1 fruit - Move right to position 6 and harvest 2 fruits - Move right to position 7 and harvest 4 fruits You moved 1 + 3 = 4 steps and harvested 7 + 1 + 2 + 4 = 14 fruits in total.

testcases.input: fruits = [[0,3],[6,4],[8,5]], startPos = 3, k = 2 Output: 0 Explanation: You can move at most k = 2 steps and cannot reach any position with fruits.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: You can move at most k = 2 steps and cannot reach any position with fruits.
